Meta.title: HYMEA — Premium concierge & cleaning in Israel
Meta.description: High-end concierge and cleaning services in Israel for shopping centres, businesses and private homes. A devotion to detail, delivered with discretion.

hero.title: Luxury, in restraint.
hero.subtitle: HYMEA cares for exceptional places: shopping centres, offices and private interiors. A confidential, meticulous service, made to last.

intro.title: One standard of care, three expectations.
intro.description: From the flow of a shopping centre to the intimacy of a home, HYMEA delivers a single promise — flawless detail — in the register each place deserves.

shoppingCentres.label: Shopping centres
shoppingCentres.title: The SEGULA concept
shoppingCentres.description: Lift the visitor experience and the average basket through exceptional hospitality: a lounge, valet service, a personal shopper, a stylist and a loyalty club, united under one signature.

businesses.label: Businesses
businesses.title: HYMEA Lounge & offices
businesses.description: Offices maintained to the highest standard and a HYMEA Lounge that nurtures your employer brand. Cleanliness becomes an argument — discreet and constant.

individuals.label: Individuals
individuals.title: The art of detail, at home
individuals.description: Homes, vehicles, furniture and textiles entrusted to a team that treats every surface as a rare piece. The comfort of a flawless interior, effortlessly.

Contact.title: Let's talk about your space and your standards.
Contact.description: A presentation, a quote or a first intervention: we get back to you quickly, with a proposal that matches your expectations.
Contact.offerDetail: A welcome offer to experience the HYMEA standard, with no commitment.

Footer.tagline: High-end concierge and cleaning in Israel. Care for detail, delivered with discretion.

NotFound.title: This page has slipped away.
NotFound.description: The link you followed no longer exists, or never did. Let's return to what matters.
